mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, account_type, uid, verify_type, email, phone, verify_code, verify_code_type, verify_code_send_time, fail_times, last_fail_date
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM dm_auth_verify WHERE verify_type = #{verifyType,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.auth.VerifyType} AND verify_code_type=#{verifyCodeType} AND email=#{email} AND account_type='PRIMARY_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
FROM dm_auth_verify WHERE verify_type = #{verifyType,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.auth.VerifyType} AND verify_code_type=#{verifyCodeType} AND phone=#{phone} AND account_type='PRIMARY_ACCOUNT'
